reference: Can a baby's heartbeat stop and start again? My baby's heartbeat cannot be detected. Is it because I am too early or am I miscarrying? At first, doctors calculated that I was eleven weeks. I had my first ultrasound yesterday, and I was told I was nine weeks. No heartbeat was detected, and I was told I was having a missed miscarriage. But just to be safe, the doctor scheduled me for a second ultrasound on January 26th. Help me, please.
text: Can a baby's heartbeat stop and start again? My baby's heartbeat cannot be detected. Is it because I am too early, or am I missing? At first, doctors calculated that I was 11 weeks. I had my first ultrasound yesterday, and I was told I was nine weeks. No heartbeat was detected, and I was told I was having a miscarriage. But just to be safe, the doctor scheduled me for a second ultrasound on January 26. Help me, please.
